jd_analysis_result.summary: Complete Care Team is seeking passionate Disability Support Workers to provide high-quality services to clients with acquired brain injury and high support needs in their homes. The role involves assisting clients with various personal and clinical care tasks while maintaining a flexible schedule.

skill_evidence.dementia care: experience working with clients with a disability, ABI , Dementia and or/high support needs
skill_evidence.disability support: experience working with clients with a disability, ABI , Dementia and or/high support needs
skill_evidence.verbal communication: Good communication skills verbal and written
skill_evidence.written communication: Good communication skills verbal and written

responsibilities: assist clients with ABI and high support needs living in their homes
deliver the company’s client-centred care program
provide personal care, physiotherapy & exercise programs
assist with appointments, vocational assistance, shopping, domestic duties and recreational activities
